name: Grand Isle Feast
description: A lavish spread of roasted fogfin cod, spiced meat and wild herbs, laid out as if for a captain's table on the Shrouded Isle. A feast like this leaves a body fed for hours and spoiling for a fight.

messages.text: You feast on {item} until you can eat no more, strength coursing through your limbs.
{source} sits down to a grand feast of {item}.
